Off Calendar Jun-27-2011 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: DEFENDANTS NATURE'S PATH FOODS, INC., STATER BROS. MARKETS' MOTION FOR ORDERS 1) DISMISSING THE ACTION; OR, ALTERNATIVELY, 2) TRANSFERRING VENUE; AND 3) AWARDING FEES AND COSTS. No appearances. The court adopted its tentative ruling as follows: Defendant's motion for change of venue is granted. The matter is transferred to San Bernardino County. Requests for fees and costs are denied. Prevailing party to submit a proposed form of order. (302/LMG) Judge: Loretta M. Giorgi, Reporter: Karla Ellis-Davis, CSR #12998

Notice Of Motion And Motion For Orders 1) Dismissing The Action; Or, Alternativly, 2) Transferring Venue; And 3) Awarding Fees And Costs; Request For Judicial Notice
Off Calendar Jun-02-2011 Continued To Jun-27-11 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES:
DEFENDANTS NATURE'S PATH FOODS, INC. AND STATER BROS. MARKETS MOTION FOR ORDERS: (1) DISMISSING THE ACTION; OR, ALTERNATIVELY, (2) TRANSFERRING VENUE; AND, (3) AWARDING FEES AND COSTS.

APPEARANCES: Paul A. Henreid, Esq. of Law Office of Paul Henreid 619/756-5002 for pltf & opposing party (appearing via CourtCall); J. Craig Williams, Esq. of Sedgwick LLP 949/852-8200 for defts & moving parties (appearing via CourtCall).

RULING: Argued and the Court took the matter under submission.
After hearing the Court ruled as follows: Hearing on motion continued for defendant to file certified copy of record from Secretary of State or declaration supporting motion. Must be filed by June 13, 2011 with a courtesy copy to department 302. Plaintiff may refile opposition by June 17, 2011 (courtesy copy to department 302). Defendant may file reply by June 22, 2011 (courtesy copy to department 302). Hearing on June 27, 2011 at 9:30am. (302/LMG) Judge: Loretta M. Giorgi, Reporter: Carlito Mandia, CSR 689
